title: China's CNAF to Invest in Private Chinese SAF Plant
content: ChinaГўв‚¬в„ўs aviation fuel giant is quietly shifting its strategy: China National Aviation Fuel (CNAF) has taken a stake in Henan JunhengГўв‚¬в„ўs sustainable aviation fuel plant, its second investment in a private Гўв‚¬Е“green jet fuelГўв‚¬Вќ maker, signaling a deeper push into low-carbon fuels even without a national mandate. Junheng, which converts ChinaГўв‚¬в„ўs abundant used cooking oil into SAF, is scaling output from 400,000 to 1 million tons per year by mid-2026. The move follows CNAFГўв‚¬в„ўs recent 10% purchase in JiaaoГўв‚¬в„ўs SAF facility for 261 million yuan, as pilot SAF use at Beijing, Chengdu, Zhengzhou, and Ningbo airports expands nationwide.
author: Analysts Account
